## Summary

<!-- 1 to 3 bullets describing the change and the problem it solves. -->

## Changes

- [ ] Code change(s)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated (CHANGELOG, README, docs/*)

## Verification

<!-- How did you test this? Local commands, transaction hashes or signatures. -->

```bash
npm run lint
npm test
npm run build
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Followed conventional commit format
- [ ] No security-sensitive changes (or, if so, coordinated via SECURITY.md)
- [ ] No changes to discriminators / PDA seeds / ABI that break callers without a test
